bank: Headline with more emotionally charged words gets more clicks
Headline that uses numbers or list format gets more clicks
Headline phrased as a question gets more clicks
Headline that uses superlative adjectives gets more clicks
Headline that is shorter but informative gets more clicks
Headline that directly addresses the reader with 'you' or 'your' gets more clicks
Headline that uses active voice gets more clicks
Headline that places the most important information at the start gets more clicks
Headline that contains power words like 'secret' or 'revealed' gets more clicks
Headline that uses clear and simple language gets more clicks
Headline that promises novel or unique information gets more clicks
Headline that uses trending keywords gets more clicks
Headline that avoids ambiguity unless triggering curiosity gets more clicks
Headline with social proof or authority cues gets more clicks
Headline that avoids clickbait exaggeration gets more clicks
